title: Fish
description: Turn your Mace into a FISH
body:
Did you ever want to turn your mace into a **FISH** well you found the right resource pack to fulfill your deepest desires!!!11!11!

And all that at a small small price of **NOTHING**!

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459a7bda20c1130e00e4477d6a8deee1d3035027.png)

-Turns the mace Model and Texture into A Fish so you can **Slack your opponents** in MacePVP



![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d35e6ea9960df449d1a08fe1341b5355ccac61.png)

Compatible with:
Sodium and
Optifine
DOES NOT HAVE DEPENDENCIES

![Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fec3143977917f903d7136ef0730c3fa0d4ab957.png)
